list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE bot_id <> '' ORDER BY 1;
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE bot_id <> '' ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 1000;
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 1000;

list.name: symbol
list.label: Symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol AS __value, symbol AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE symbol <> '' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1;
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT symbol AS __value, symbol AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE symbol <> '' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: step_name
list.label: Step
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT step_name AS __value, step_name AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1;
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT step_name AS __value, step_name AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: metric_name
list.label: Metric
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT metric_name AS __value, metric_name AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1;
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT metric_name AS __value, metric_name AS __text FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), step_name AS metric, max(p95_value)::double precision AS value FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${step_name:raw}'='__all' OR step_name='${step_name:raw}') AND ('${metric_name:raw}'='__all' OR metric_name='${metric_name:raw}') AND metric_name='duration_ms' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), metric_name AS metric, max(p95_value)::double precision AS value FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${step_name:raw}'='__all' OR step_name='${step_name:raw}') AND ('${metric_name:raw}'='__all' OR metric_name='${metric_name:raw}') AND metric_name <> 'duration_ms' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), step_name AS metric, sum(sample_count)::double precision AS value FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${step_name:raw}'='__all' OR step_name='${step_name:raw}') AND ('${metric_name:raw}'='__all' OR metric_name='${metric_name:raw}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), metric_name AS metric, max(p95_value)::double precision AS value FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${step_name:raw}'='__all' OR step_name='${step_name:raw}') AND ('${metric_name:raw}'='__all' OR metric_name='${metric_name:raw}') AND metric_name IN ('canonical_append_ms','canonical_fact_persist_batch_ms','canonical_fact_persist_lag_ms','canonical_fact_queue_depth','step_trace_persist_batch_ms','step_trace_persist_lag_ms','step_trace_queue_depth','step_trace_dropped_count') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT bucket_start AS time, run_id, step_name, metric_name, NULLIF(symbol, '') AS symbol, sample_count, round(p95_value::numeric, 2)::double precision AS p95_value, round(value_max::numeric, 2)::double precision AS max_value FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${step_name:raw}'='__all' OR step_name='${step_name:raw}') AND ('${metric_name:raw}'='__all' OR metric_name='${metric_name:raw}') ORDER BY value_max DESC, p95_value DESC LIMIT 100;

SELECT step_name, metric_name, NULLIF(symbol, '') AS symbol, sum(sample_count) AS samples, round((sum(value_sum) / NULLIF(sum(sample_count), 0))::numeric, 2)::double precision AS avg_value, round(max(p95_value)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS p95_value, round(max(value_max)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS max_value, sum(error_count) AS errors FROM public.portal_bot_run_step_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${step_name:raw}'='__all' OR step_name='${step_name:raw}') AND ('${metric_name:raw}'='__all' OR metric_name='${metric_name:raw}') GROUP BY step_name, metric_name, symbol ORDER BY max_value DESC NULLS LAST, samples DESC LIMIT 200;
